text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I feel like my skin is a little dry...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(Coffee does have diuretic properties, so too
much of it can dehydrate your skin...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should cut back a bit. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coupled with her skin troubles, Manhattan Cafe's
decision to abstain from coffee sends her into a
spiral.
